code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [Retail_PointOfSale] --> Initializing: Component mounted

    Initializing --> Loading: Subscribe to DMs
    Loading --> Empty: No messages
    Loading --> ThreadList: Messages loaded
    Loading --> Error: Subscription failed

    Empty --> ThreadList: First message received

    ThreadList --> ThreadSelected: User selects thread
    ThreadSelected --> ThreadList: Back to list
    ThreadSelected --> Composing: User types message

    Composing --> Encrypting: User sends
    Encrypting --> Publishing: Encryption complete
    Publishing --> ThreadSelected: Publish success
    Publishing --> Error: Publish failed

    ThreadSelected --> MarkingRead: Auto-mark as read
    MarkingRead --> ThreadSelected: Update complete

    ThreadList --> Refreshing: Pull to refresh
    Refreshing --> ThreadList: Refresh complete

    ThreadSelected --> Deleting: User deletes thread
    Deleting --> ThreadList: Delete complete

    Error --> ThreadList: Retry success
    Error --> [Retail_OrderManagement]: Fatal error

    note right of Encrypting
        NIP04Service encrypts
        message using recipient's
        public key
    end note

    note right of Publishing
        EventPublisherService
        publishes kind 4 event
        to relays
    end note
compilation_error: [WinError 2] 系统找不到指定的文件。

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为零售POS端的私信模块设计一个完整的状态流转图。核心场景是：组件挂载后开始初始化，订阅DM服务，然后进入消息列表。用户选中会话后可以发消息、删会话，还有自动标记已读的功能。
明白了。关于加密和发布环节，我理解发消息时要先加密再发布到中继，对吗？另外错误处理方面，订阅失败和发布失败都要考虑，还有致命错误需要跳转到订单管理后台？
对的。加密用NIP04Service，发布用EventPublisherService发kind 4事件。错误分两种：可恢复的错误可以重试回到列表，致命错误比如鉴权失败就直接退出到订单管理主界面。
好的，我先画出主干流程：从POS组件挂载到初始化，订阅DM后加载，空态和列表态的切换，选中会话后的发消息流程，包括加密、发布、成功返回。还有自动标记已读和删除会话的分支。
还需要加上下拉刷新功能，用户可以在列表页下拉获取最新消息。另外从选中会话返回列表要有明确的Back操作。
已添加Refreshing状态，从ThreadList触发Pull to refresh，完成后回到列表。ThreadSelected到ThreadList的Back to list也画好了。现在补充两个技术注释：加密环节说明NIP04Service使用接收方公钥，发布环节说明EventPublisherService发布kind 4事件。
整体结构没问题。再确认一下空态的流转：首次进入如果没有消息显示Empty，收到第一条消息后自动转到ThreadList，这个逻辑正确吧？
是的，Empty通过First message received事件转到ThreadList。另外Error状态也有两条出路：Retry success回到列表，Fatal error退出到Retail_OrderManagement。所有状态流转都完整了。
